rows.description: Amount of Stock Plan Account 2576.10.7 extra year in Dw. 66.17.6 - bought making
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms the monetary amount 99.8.10. This amount is correctly identified by gemini-flash (R10), gpt-5-mini (R11), and claude-haiku (R9). The description is a consolidation of the multiple lines on the page that lead to this amount. It includes embedded reference amounts (2576.10.7, 66.17.6) that are part of the description, not separate P/S/D column entries for this row. claude-haiku correctly placed 99.8.10 as the P/S/D amount, while other extractors incorrectly treated embedded amounts as P/S/D column entries for other rows. 'side' value inferred from visual alignment.

Visual verification confirms the amount is 2576.7.5. Both gemini-flash (R11) and gpt-5-mini (R12) correctly extracted this amount and identified it as a total. claude-haiku (R10) significantly misread the amount. gpt-5-mini's description 'making' is contextually appropriate, connecting it to the preceding entry. 'side' value inferred from visual alignment.
